name: Unreal Engine Exporter (WASM)
description: Export entities as Unreal Engine DataAssets and DataTables. Generate C++ USTRUCT definitions, push data via UE REST API or direct file export with blueprint-ready structs and batch game data pipelines.
author: BiloxiStudios

ue_project_path.label: Unreal Project Path
ue_project_path.description: Path to the Unreal Engine project root (contains .uproject)

ue_rest_api_url.label: UE Remote Control URL
ue_rest_api_url.description: URL of the Unreal Remote Control API (e.g. http://localhost:30010). Leave blank for file-only export.

output_dir.label: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Subdirectory under Content/ for exported assets (e.g., CityOfBrains/Data)

module_name.label: C++ Module Name
module_name.description: Name of the Unreal C++ module for generated headers

generate_datatables.label: Generate DataTables
generate_datatables.description: Also generate DataTable CSV exports alongside DataAssets

struct_prefix.label: Struct Prefix
struct_prefix.description: Prefix for generated C++ struct names (e.g., F or FCB_)

export_portraits.label: Export Portraits as Textures
export_portraits.description: Copy entity portraits to the project's Content/Textures folder

auto_reimport.label: Auto-reimport in Editor
auto_reimport.description: Trigger asset reimport via Remote Control after export
